Subject: Complaint Decision – CMP-ING-1774030093263-b33656f
From: Customer Support <arp290825@gmail.com>
To: Customer Support <arp290825@gmail.com>
Date: March 21, 2026 03:28 PM

21 March 2026

Dear Emily Johnson,

RE: Complaint Decision – Reference CMP-ING-1774030093263-b33656f

We have reviewed your complaint and regret to inform you that we are unable to process it at this time.

REASON
  Your product is outside the warranty period.

Your options:
  1. Out-of-warranty paid repair — contact repairs@electronics.com
  2. Reply within 14 days with additional evidence for re-evaluation.

Kind regards,
Customer Support Team
Consumer Electronics

autoEmailResponse.subject: Action Required: Documents Needed — Complaint CMP-ING-1774106933344-9a41ae0
autoEmailResponse.body:
Dear Emily Johnson,

Thank you for getting in touch with Consumer Electronics Customer Support.

We have received your complaint (Reference: CMP-ING-1774106933344-9a41ae0) regarding your Not specified and want to resolve this for you as quickly as possible.

To progress your complaint, we need the following document(s):

  • Purchase Invoice
  • Product Model

These documents help us verify your purchase and process your claim efficiently.

What to do next:
  • Reply to this email with the document(s) attached, or
  • Contact us quoting your complaint reference: CMP-ING-1774106933344-9a41ae0

Once we receive the required information, our team will review your case and
respond with an outcome within 2 business days.

If you have any difficulty locating these documents, please reply and we'll
do our best to assist you.

We apologise for the additional step and appreciate your cooperation.

Kind regards,
Customer Support Team
Consumer Electronics
  Email: support@electronics.com  |  Phone: 1-800-ELEC-HELP (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm)
